title: clutia rubricaulis var. microphylla
intro: Clutia rubricaulis var. microphylla, also known as small-leaved clutia, is a shrub or small tree plant native to tropical regions. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Clutia rubricaulis var. microphylla include treating skin conditions, wounds, and infections, as well as providing relief from fever and pain. Herbal preparations of Clutia rubricaulis var. microphylla can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for use.
